meaning: n.粗大的一端,靶垛,笑柄v.以头抵撞,碰撞
examples: Frieda grinned, pinching him on the butt.
Sorry, I don't mean to butt in.
She was the butt of some very unkind jokes.
Over the years, plenty of real estate jargon has become the butt of jokes.
But the wicket of the other opener, Salman Butt, changed the game quite dramatically.
